[Other portents are—eclipses, fall of meteors and the like.
Their effects are to be judged according to the Mandala or Circle in
which they occur.

The author states that the time of fruition of an earthquake is
six months, but in his abridged Sarhhita we find him giving two
months for the Wind Circle, three fortnights for the Fire Circle,
seven days for Indra's Circle and lastly immediate effect for the
last one.]
The following three verses also occur in the but
they are translated because of their importance.
